The '''Klytonians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="Poster" /> originating in the [[Klytonia system/Legends|Klytonia system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Bheriz sector/Legends|Bheriz sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Their bodies were covered with [[Leather/Legends|leathery]] scales, which produced electric field vibrations that allowed them to communicate with each other.<ref name="Poster" />

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The events of {{StoryCite|story=Cantina Communications|book=Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16}} take place during [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi's]] visit to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], which is depicted in {{Film|IV}} and dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> multiple Klytonians were present at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[City/Legends|settlement]] on<ref name="Poster" /> the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The Klytonians communicated with each other across the room they were in.<ref name="Poster" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Klytonians were created by [[John Chesterman]] for "[[Cantina Communications]]," a one-page vignette included in ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16]]'',<ref name="Poster" /> published in [[1979]]<ref name="Hyperspace">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/sourcearchive/news20070618.html|text=Cantina Communications|int=Cantina Communications}}</ref> by [[Paradise Press]].<ref name="Poster" />

==Appearances==
